Banded: If it helps, I cannot help with issues like that on my end. Sorry!
But perhaps our team will be able to apply the code to your order.
To check on that, please give us a call at 1-800-333-5119 Monday-Friday, from 8 am to 5 pm CST. You can also email us directly at info@banded.com Our team is happy to help!

send_to_cs: Send to CS for post purchase issues, use PPI shortcut
escalate: ESC immediatly for any inquiries about why all loungewear/pajamas were removed from the site, don't give any answers to customers
ESC any embroidery or product customisation inquiries
For free shipping use FS shortcut, if there are further complaints ESC
Welcome codes are sent via SMS only, not email, ESC if we don't have a code after posting in ops-issues
templates: The NCODE temp offers codes to customers

conversation.message_text: SwimOutlet: Welcome! Std Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Info: https://attnl.tv/t/WJk/r/CA

SwimOutlet: Hi! Welcome to SwimOutlet! Click this link to use your 10% off. Your code will automatically be applied. https://swimoutlet.attn.tv/ajlNghZj-CaO . STOP to cancel. Info: https://attnl.tv/t/WJk/r/CA. StdMsg&Data rates may apply.
SwimOutlet: Help at support@attentivemobile.com. Std Msg&data rates may apply. Msg freq varies. Reply STOP to cancel. Info: https://attnl.tv/t/WJk/r/CA Stop to stop
Notice said 15 per cent off, not 10

SwimOutlet: I see there's a discrepancy with your discount. The coupon code S15FPJB8XBP should indeed provide a 15% off on full priced items. Could you please share a screenshot of the issue? This will help us resolve it faster.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for VAT inquiries
escalate: ESC any inquiries and comments regarding AI & how it's being used for their products or design immediately
ESC if cx are looking for a design that is showcased on the site and you can't find it
If a customer is frustrated and wants to speak via phone directly use the temp "phone call" & ESC ( ESC note: Customer requests to speak over the phone)
tone: Close the convo one the client takes over
Close the convo if cx first message is "no"
Use yards not meters as a metric system
dos_and_donts: They never go out of stock, it's print to order
drive_to_purchase: Do not recommend directly any of the NO AI products!
If we don't have the design the customer is looking for, don't DTP
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome15fabric and welcome15homedec codes are no longer valid, use WELCOME15 instead
Some codes require customers to be logged into their account
